title: llm.diarize
description: Speaker diarization through the configured backend (explicit provider > DEFAULT_DIARIZATION_PROVIDER; single provider, no fallback chain). comm carries URLs only, never raw audio bytes. Returns {status: 'ok', diarization: NormalizedDiarization, provider_used: string} or {status: 'failure', reason: string}. Turns are who-spoke-when only — fusing them with STT words (merge policy) is the caller's job.

num_speakers.description: Exact speaker count hint; omit to let the provider decide. Bound hints (min_speakers/max_speakers) travel via provider_options and are mutually exclusive with the exact count.

timeout_seconds.description: Hard cap on the diarization request.

provider_options.description: Free-form per-provider passthrough, applied AFTER the adapter's own request params — pin provider specifics without a core release. Unknown keys go to the provider as-is.
